description: Reminder email adds parking instructions to existing event

actual.title: Medical Appointment - Dr. Smith
actual.description: Annual checkup appointment. Reminder: Arrive 15 min early. Free parking in garage level 2. Bring insurance card.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Medical Appointment - Dr. Smith
- Start: 2026-03-30T11:00:00
- End: 2026-03-30T11:30:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Downtown Medical Center, Suite 405
- Description: Annual checkup appointment
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: reminder):**
- Title: Medical Appointment - Dr. Smith
- Start: 2026-03-30T11:00:00
- End: 2026-03-30T11:30:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Downtown Medical Center, Suite 405
- Description: Reminder: Arrive 15 min early. Free parking in garage level 2. Bring insurance card.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}
